[2020-12-03 17:16] silentslayers: It's the value of a drone. It gives you 1, then 1/R, then 1/R^2, then 1/R^3...
[2020-12-03 17:17] megasupp (mega-supp): Wait shouldn't f be exactly 4 ?
[2020-12-03 17:17] silentslayers: And you can convert that to a geometric series and get the formula for that infinite series
[2020-12-03 17:17] silentslayers: if I make i = 0.33333 and add more 3's yeah

[2020-12-03 17:18] silentslayers: I should make it 1/3 😛
[2020-12-03 17:18] megasupp (mega-supp): Yeah I see but it also says that unit that produces X value each turn is worth fX
[2020-12-03 17:20] silentslayers: Yeah like a cannon produces a bv that your opponent has to make each turn, so it'd be b * t^0.5 * f

[2020-12-03 17:26] silentslayers: And find how efficient all the drones actually are when energy matters
